This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 123 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/123). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run. If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). This is the 'body' field - do not use 'comment_body' or other variations. If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). If auto-targeting fails (e.g., for schedule or workflow_dispatch triggers), the tool call will fail with an error.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for this comment. 2026-03-30T22:06:29.9879020Z {"timestamp":"2026-03-30T22:06:14.34684254Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":57594,\"title\":\"Synapse test recordings need re-recording (stale Storage Management API version)\",\"body\":\"## Problem\\n\\nSynapse recorded tests fail with `TestRecordingMismatchException` when run with `UseProjectReferenceToAzureClients=true` (used in Azure.Core PR CI batches).\\n\\n**Error:** `.properties: Missing in record JSON` - the Storage account PUT request body now includes `\\u0026#34;properties\\u0026#34;: {}` but the recordings don\\u0026#39;t have it. Additionally, the recorded api-version (`2022-09-01`) does not match the current Storage Management SDK version (`2025-08-01`).\\n\\n**Failing test:** `TestBigDatapoolLifeCycle` (linux net9.0)\\n**Build:** [net - pullrequest #20260330.38 (Build ID 6081799)](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/public/_build/results?buildId=6081799\\u0026amp;view=ms.vss-test-web.build-test-results-tab\\u0026amp;runId=60599078\\u0026amp;resultId=104911\\u0026amp;paneView=debug)\\n\\n## Root Cause\\n\\nThis is the same pattern as #57316 (HealthcareApis):\\n\\n- Synapse test recordings use Azure Storage Management API to provision storage accounts as test setup infrastructure\\n- The Storage Management SDK has been updated to use `api-version=2025-08-01` (up from `2022-09-01`)\\n- The newer API version serializes `.properties` unconditionally (WriteCore serialization change)\\n- With `UseProjectReferenceToAzureClients=true`, the tests pick up the newer Storage client source instead of the NuGet package, causing the mismatch\\n- This surfaces intermittently when Synapse tests land in the same CI batch as the PR being tested\\n\\n## Impact\\n\\nAffects any PR that randomly gets Synapse in its `UseProjectReferenceToAzureClients=true` integration batch. Currently observed in PR #57479.\\n\\n## Fix Required\\n\\nRe-record Synapse tests to capture the updated Storage Management API version and serialization format. At minimum, `TestBigDatapoolLifeCycle` is affected; other scenario tests that create storage accounts may also be affected.\\n\\nSee #57316 and PR #57317 for the analogous HealthcareApis fix pattern.\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/57594\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"jsquire\",\"id\":913445,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/jsquire\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/913445?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Synapse\"],\"assignees\":[\"ArthurMa1978\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-03-30T22:04:08Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-30T22:04:08Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}

Additionally, the recorded api-version (`2022-09-01`) does not match the current Storage Management SDK version (`2025-08-01`).\\n\\n**Failing test:** `TestBigDatapoolLifeCycle` (linux net9.0)\\n**Build:** [net - pullrequest #20260330.38 (Build ID 6081799)](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/public/_build/results?buildId=6081799\\u0026amp;view=ms.vss-test-web.build-test-results-tab\\u0026amp;runId=60599078\\u0026amp;resultId=104911\\u0026amp;paneView=debug)\\n\\n## Root Cause\\n\\nThis is the same pattern as #57316 (HealthcareApis):\\n\\n- Synapse test recordings use Azure Storage Management API to provision storage accounts as test setup infrastructure\\n- The Storage Management SDK has been updated to use `api-version=2025-08-01` (up from `2022-09-01`)\\n- The newer API version serializes `.properties` unconditionally (WriteCore serialization change)\\n- With `UseProjectReferenceToAzureClients=true`, the tests pick up the newer Storage client source instead of the NuGet package, causing the mismatch\\n- This surfaces intermittently when Synapse tests land in the same CI batch as the PR being tested\\n\\n## Impact\\n\\nAffects any PR that randomly gets Synapse in its `UseProjectReferenceToAzureClients=true` integration batch. Currently observed in PR #57479.\\n\\n## Fix Required\\n\\nRe-record Synapse tests to capture the updated Storage Management API version and serialization format.
